---
layout: cv
title: Oran Jackson's CV
---
# Oran Jackson
Student.

<div id="webaddress">
<a href="oran.juice26@gmail.com">oran.juice26@gmail.com</a>
|
</div>


## Currently

Studying Data Science at Brigham Young University-Idaho


## Education

`2025-Current`
__Brigham Young University-Idaho, Rexburg.__


<!-- ### Footer

Last updated: April 2026 -->
